# Voxel / Sparse Discretization

**Path:** `global_descriptor/learning/discretization`

Learned global descriptors based primarily on voxels, sparse convolutions, or other 3D discretizations.

## Scope

**Include:** sparse convolutional FPN; voxel transformer

**Exclude:** 2D projection CNN
